name: Southwest Burgers
keywords: beef tex-mex main dish meats sauces
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Chopped Green Chiles (Use 1 4-oz can of chopped green chiles and drain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fresh tomato salsa as per the Southwest recipe.
2. Form the ground beef into patties with the diced Monterey Jack cheese enclosed in each patty.
3. Season the patties with salt and pepper to taste.
